worldData.instructions:
SUB-MAIN — the group layer

Every sub-main is a formation someone founded: a named gathering, not a world. Yours holds the center.
HOVER a bubble to hear its name · CLICK to step into the group
Inside: its shelf — the worlds its members pinned. JOIN to belong, + PIN A WORLD to add to the shelf.

One sub-main per person — ⌂ FOUND YOURS starts it.
◂ SUB-MAINS steps back out · ESC climbs home.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: CAFE: hover-bloom portals, click to step through
